text: I was walking on a quiet path.
We were taking photos of the view.
I was walking when it started to rain.
While she was reading, I took a photo.
So, how was your journey to the mountains? Tell me everything!
It was an adventure! One afternoon I was walking on a quiet path, and I was taking photos of the amazing scenery.
That sounds beautiful. And then? What happened?
Well, I was not looking at the map, and suddenly I got lost! But then I saw a kind old man who was reading near a tree.
Oh, lucky you! Did he help you find the way back?
Yes! He showed me the way. Now, when I remember that journey, I always smile. It is my favorite memory.

Last summer I had a small adventure on a trip to the mountains. One afternoon I was walking on a quiet path, and I was taking photos of the amazing scenery. The view was beautiful. I was so happy that I was not looking at the map. Suddenly, I got lost. I was a little scared, but then I saw an old man. He was sitting near a tree and reading a book. He was very kind, and he showed me the way back. Now, when I remember that journey, I always smile. The best stories happen when you are not planning them.

I want to tell you about my favorite travel memory. A few years ago, I was visiting a small town near the sea. It was early morning, and the streets were still quiet. While I was walking to the beach, I heard music. A group of people were dancing and singing in a little square. They were celebrating a local festival. I stopped, and I watched them for a long time. I was not taking photos that day. I was just living the moment. That memory is still so clear. Sometimes the best part of a journey is the thing you did not plan.

First, Tânia was walking on a quiet path in the mountains. Then she was taking photos of the amazing view, so she was not looking at the map. After that, she suddenly got lost and felt a little scared. Next, she saw a kind old man who was reading near a tree. Finally, he showed her the way, and now that journey is her favorite memory.
I was walking on a quiet path.
They were taking photos of the view.
I was reading when the phone rang.
While I was walking, I heard music.
That trip is my favorite memory.
I was sleeping when the phone rang.
